executives.name: Aaron Jagdfeld
executives.background: Mr. Jagdfeld has served as President and Chief Executive Officer of Generac since September 2008 and as a director since 2006. He joined Generac in 1994 and has served in various roles, including Chief Financial Officer from 2002 to 2007 and President from 2007 to 2008.

board_of_directors.name: Aaron Jagdfeld
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Jagdfeld has served as President and Chief Executive Officer of Generac since September 2008 and as a director since 2006. He joined Generac in 1994 and has served in various roles, including Chief Financial Officer from 2002 to 2007 and President from 2007 to 2008.
